[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101000 3
1 1001001 3
2 0101011 4
3 1101000 3
4 1001001 3
5 0100010 2
6 1000000 1
7 0001001 2

01 10 0000000 a
12 21 0101000 2
23 32 1101000 3 match 0 3

45 54 0110111 5
56 65 1001001 3 match 1 4
67 76 1001000 2
70 07 1000000 1 match 6

13 31 0101001 3
24 42 0100000 1
35 53 1111001 5

71 17 0101010 3

50 05 1000000 1 match 6
61 16 0001001 2 match 7
72 27 1101000 3 match 0 3

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 0101011 4 match 2
26 62 1001000 2
37 73 1101000 3 match 0 3
